data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures communications and stored data are encrypted from end to end.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.3 for secure communication and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Continuous Monitoring
data.description: 24/7 active monitoring of infrastructure for potential security threats.
data.technical_spec: Employs IDS/IPS systems and SIEM tools for real-time threat detection.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Requires multiple forms of verification for user access to strengthen authentication.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with systems like Duo or Authy for second-factor authentication.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits and penetration tests to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party cybersecurity firms for unbiased security assessments.

data.title: Data Anonymization Techniques
data.description: Applies techniques to anonymize sensitive information in datasets.
data.technical_spec: Uses k-anonymity and differential privacy models to mask data.
